_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "food_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "category" TEXT NULL, "is_favorite" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_favorite" IN (0, 1)), "usage_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "last_used_at" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "food_attributes" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "food_item_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES food_items (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "source" TEXT NOT NULL, "key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("food_item_id", "source", "key"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "meal_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "occurred_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "meal_type" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "meal_entry_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "meal_entry_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES meal_entries (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "food_item_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES food_items (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "portion_description" TEXT NULL, "quantity" REAL NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "symptom_types" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "preset_key" TEXT NULL UNIQUE, "custom_name" TEXT NULL, "is_archived" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_archived" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), CHECK ((preset_key IS NULL) != (custom_name IS NULL)));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "symptom_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "occurred_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "symptom_type_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES symptom_types (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "intensity" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("intensity" BETWEEN 1 AND 10), "duration_minutes" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "bowel_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "occurred_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "bristol_type" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("bristol_type" BETWEEN 1 AND 7), "urgency" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("urgency" IN (0, 1)), "pain" INTEGER NULL CHECK("pain" BETWEEN 1 AND 10), "blood" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("blood" IN (0, 1)), "mucus" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("mucus" IN (0, 1)), "incomplete_evacuation" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("incomplete_evacuation" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "weight_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "occurred_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "weight_kg" REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "water_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "occurred_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "amount_ml" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sleep_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_day" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "bed_at" TEXT NULL, "woke_at" TEXT NULL, "duration_minutes" INTEGER NOT NULL, "quality" INTEGER NULL CHECK("quality" BETWEEN 1 AND 5), "notes" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "activity_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "occurred_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "activity_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "duration_minutes" INTEGER NOT NULL, "effort" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "medications" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "dosage" TEXT NULL, "schedule_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "scheduled_times" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', "start_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "end_day" TEXT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "notes" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "medication_intakes" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "occurred_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "medication_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES medications (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "scheduled_time" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "fodmap_challenges" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "fodmap_group" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "start_day" TEXT NOT NULL, "test_end_day" TEXT NULL, "completed_day" TEXT NULL, "outcome" TEXT NULL, "outcome_note" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
